disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Weeks of deep, constant low back and pelvic ache that tonight escalated sharply over about two hours
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the back pain — how long, and what changed tonight?
Was the pain there before tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My back's been aching deep and constant for weeks now, but tonight it suddenly got much, much worse over an hour or two.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New bilateral leg weakness — both legs gave way on standing and he can no longer bear weight or mobilise
trigger_question_examples: What happened when you tried to stand?
Can you move or lift your legs now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I tried to stand both my legs completely gave way and I dropped back onto the bed — now they feel like jelly and I can't move them properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Numbness in both legs / lower body reported by the patient
trigger_question_examples: Do your legs feel numb or is it just weakness?
Any change in sensation in your legs or around your bottom?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — my legs feel weak and a bit numb as well, not just the weakness.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No urinary or faecal incontinence and no saddle numbness (patient denies on direct questioning)
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost control of your bladder or bowels?
Any numbness around your groin or back passage?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't wet or soiled myself, and I don't have numbness around my groin — it's my legs.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss of about 6 kg
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight recently without trying?
How has your appetite and weight been?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've dropped about 6 kilos without trying to — my clothes are loose.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Six months of progressive lower urinary tract symptoms — hesitancy, weak stream, nocturia — attributed by the patient to ageing
trigger_question_examples: Any problems with your waterworks?
How is your urine stream and do you get up at night?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For about six months my stream's been weak and slow to start and I'm up a few times a night, but I just thought that was old age.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Aching bone pain across the lower back and pelvis over roughly three months, unrelieved by simple analgesia
trigger_question_examples: How long has the ache been there and does anything help it?
Where exactly do you feel the ache?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been aching deep in my lower back and pelvis for a few months now, and paracetamol and ibuprofen do nothing for it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Erectile dysfunction over the past year
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes in sexual function?
Any problems with erections over the past year?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now you mention it, I've had trouble with erections for about the last year.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Simple analgesia (paracetamol and ibuprofen) taken tonight with no effect
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain, and did it help?
What have you tried so far for the pain tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took paracetamol and some ibuprofen tonight and it did absolutely nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cannot stand, bear weight or safely evacuate a two-storey home; spouse present and unable to move him
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to move at all, and is anyone with you?
Could you get to a car if you needed to?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't move off the bed at all and my wife can't lift me — there's no way I could get to a car.
